profile.name: Muhammad Asror Alva
profile.subtitle: Fullstack Developer / Vibe
profile.about: A multidisciplinary developer focusing on high-end digital experiences. I bridge the gap between complex engineering and street-ready aesthetics. My approach is rooted in technical precision and minimalist design principles.
profile.heroDescription: Engineering digital artifacts that blend raw street culture with sophisticated technical architecture. Currently pushing the boundaries of interactive web experiences.

experience.description: Leading the development of high-performance React applications. Orchestrating cloud architecture and implementing sophisticated UI systems with Framer Motion.
Developed interactive e-commerce experiences for high-end streetwear brands. Focused on micro-interactions and performance optimization.
Assisted in building responsive dashboards and maintaining internal component libraries using React and Tailwind CSS.

projects.name: Ghost Framework
projects.description: A minimalist, high-performance CSS framework designed for dark-mode streetwear aesthetics. Focused on extreme speed and type-heavy layouts.

projects.name: Vibe Engine
projects.description: An interactive audio-visualizer that syncs digital aesthetics with real-time sound input. Built for digital installations and live sets.
